hooks.prompt:
Review this session and update the persistent memory files in the memory/ directory. Follow these rules:

1. Read all four files first: memory/user.md, memory/preferences.md, memory/decisions.md, memory/people.md
2. Review the conversation that just occurred
3. Update each file with any NEW information learned — do not remove existing entries
   - memory/user.md: new facts about the user (identity, role, background, goals, working style)
   - memory/preferences.md: new preferences expressed or inferred (tools, languages, style)
   - memory/decisions.md: any decisions made (format: ## YYYY-MM-DD - Title, with decision, reason, alternatives)
   - memory/people.md: any new people mentioned (name, role, relevant details)
4. Only write to a file if there is genuinely new information to add
5. Keep entries concise and factual
